description: Explicit UI contract for the Verifier portal /settings route.
non_negotiables: PageHeader has NO subtitle and NO action buttons.
Page uses a 2-column card grid (p-grid p-grid-2): Reviewer profile (left) + Queue preferences (right).
Card titles are 'Reviewer profile' and 'Queue preferences', each with marginBottom 14.
Reviewer profile fields in fixed order: Display name → Collegium → Specialisation.
Queue preferences fields in fixed order: Default stage → Max concurrent.
Default values exactly: 'Sanjay Boodhoo', 'Sovereignty Board', 'legal · safety' (Unicode middle dot U+00B7), '4'.
Default stage select has exactly THREE options in fixed order: sovereignty / evaluation / safety (lowercase, no defaultValue in source — first option selected by default).
Specialisation default uses Unicode middle dot U+00B7 between 'legal' and 'safety' — NOT an ASCII period or middle-dot-look-alike.
All inputs use class p-input; the select also uses p-select.
Page renders NO StatCards and NO DataTable in v0.4.
Page does NOT animate cards on mount.
Cross-user edits are forbidden — actor can only edit their own settings (server-enforced 403; UI offers no affordance to edit others).
